-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://docs.signnow.com/docs/signnow/mcp-server)[Privacy Policy](https://legal.signnow.com/privacy-notice)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#d0b1a0b990a3b9b7bebebfa7feb3bfbd)
    

Get documents signed faster without switching between tools. The SignNow MCP server connects Claude directly to your SignNow account, letting you manage the entire eSignature workflow through conversation. Send signature requests, create documents from templates and pre-fill them, track invite statuses, and retrieve signed files — all by describing what you need in plain language. Whether you're handling contracts, agreements, or approvals, Claude handles the SignNow actions so you can focus on your work instead of chasing signatures.

You can use SignNow to:

**Create and Send Documents:**  
"Create a document from the Employee NDA template and send it to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) for signature"

**Track Signing Status:**  
"Check the signing status of the Sales Agreement and show me any pending signatures"

**Manage Templates:**  
"List all available templates and create a new contract from the Service Agreement template"

**Download Signed Documents:**  
"Get the download link for the completed Employment Contract"
